title: aster ageratoides var. potaninii
intro: Aster ageratoides var. potaninii, also known as the Potanin's mountain aster, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster ageratoides var. potaninii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
